title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Just Herbs - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Just Herbs - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs:
Just Herbs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs!
